GG0130B3_ORAL_HYGN_FLWP_CD GG0130B3 Self Care: Oral Hygiene Ability at Follow-Up Indicates the patient's ability to perform oral hygiene tasks at follow-up. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity. Helper assists only prior to or following the activity.
04. Supervision or touching assistance – Helper provides verbal
